children.name: p
children.textContent: Connect with experts in real time

children.name: p
children.textContent: Industry professionals ready to guide you

children.name: p
children.textContent: " How do I get my first design internship with no experience? "

children.name: p
children.textContent: Start with 3 strong case studies from personal projects. Apply to smaller agencies first — they're more open to juniors with potential than polish. Your process matters more than the outcome.

children.name: p
children.textContent: " Is a bootcamp enough to become a data scientist at a top company? "

children.name: p
children.textContent: Bootcamps give you the language but not the depth. Supplement with Kaggle competitions, read actual papers, and most importantly — build 2-3 end-to-end projects that solve real problems. That's what gets you interviews.

children.name: p
children.textContent: " What skills matter most for transitioning into product management? "

children.name: p
children.textContent: Empathy + structured thinking. PMs are translators — between users and engineers, between business goals and customer needs. Practice writing PRDs for products you use. Shadowing eng/design roles helps immensely.

children.name: p
children.textContent: Track your journey to your dream career
